action_text: Choose “Short description” from the open filter field dropdown
rationale: The filter field dropdown is already open; selecting “Short description” is the required first step to build the condition.

action_text: Type “Short description” into the filter field combobox input to filter its options
rationale: If the option list is long, typing into the combobox’s search will narrow it so “Short description” can be selected quickly.

action_text: Select “Short description” in the filter field combobox
rationale: Directly selecting the desired field via the combobox API may immediately set the filter field and enable the operator/value controls.

action_text: Switch the list Search field selector to “Short description”
rationale: As an alternate path, using the list’s built-in search by field also satisfies the requirement to filter by “Short description.”

action_text: Type “#SERIES-1f711cdf-2” into the list Search box
rationale: If using the list Search approach, entering the target token prepares executing the filter on the chosen field.
